organization.name: Singtel
keywords: wired and wireless telecommunications carriers (except satellite)
organization.raw_address: 10 Eunos Road 8, Singapore Post Centre #07-31, Singapore, 408600, SG
organization.short_description:
Singtel is a leading communications technology group based in Singapore, recognized as the country's main fixed-line operator and one of its major mobile network providers. With a history dating back to 1879, Singtel has evolved into a multinational company with operations and investments in over 20 countries. It reported a group revenue of US$11.447 billion in FY2021 and employs nearly 19,500 people.

The company offers a wide range of telecommunications and technology solutions, including fixed-line and mobile services, internet, pay television, and satellite services. Singtel is also involved in information technology, consultancy, and telecommunications equipment sales. It has made significant investments in digital transformation, focusing on 5G networks and other advanced services to enhance connectivity for both consumers and businesses. Singtel's operations extend across the Asia-Pacific region, with notable stakes in various telecommunications companies, including Optus in Australia and Bharti Airtel in India.
